_note: Genesis face cards bootstrap identity in prose (genesis:true, attach may be empty). All non-genesis sheets are pointer-only about appearance and attach the face card (+ prior rung for tiers). Tier turnarounds: only muscle/fullness grows per the lineup rung, height stays fixed. compose.py appends STYLE+NEG; do not double the style here.

sheets.prompt: Character face card portrait of a fair-skinned Korean woman in her late twenties named Seo Hae-won: soft oval face, warm dark-brown eyes, straight dark-brown shoulder-length hair, light natural makeup, small gold stud earrings. Three head-and-shoulders views in one frame — front, three-quarter, and profile — neutral relaxed expression, plain mid-grey studio cyclorama, even neutral studio lighting, no hat. Consistent identical face across all three views.

Character turnaround model sheet: EXACTLY the woman in the attached face card, full body in four views side by side — front, three-quarter, profile, back — identical in every view, wearing a cream linen sundress, wide-brim straw sun hat, tan crossbody bag, flat sandals. Slim natural tier-1 build. At the far right a plain matte-grey reference silhouette of a 6-foot man for scale; she is of normal slim human height. Faint horizontal height grid lines across the background. Height stays fixed; this is the baseline rung 1 of 6. Same face, hair, outfit, build and height in all four views. Plain mid-grey studio cyclorama, even lighting.

At the far right a plain matte-grey reference silhouette of a 6-foot man for scale, at the SAME height as in the tier-1 sheet. Faint horizontal height grid lines. DAZ3D character model sheet titled "DAZ3D CHARACTER SHEET: SEO HAE-WON", same clean layout and label style as a professional reference sheet: a fair-skinned Korean woman in her late twenties, slim, 168 cm (5 foot 6), long straight dark-brown hair past the shoulders, delicate lotus pendant necklace, small stud earrings, wearing a fitted white ribbed tank top, high-waist blue denim shorts, white low sneakers, a tan crossbody bag. A THREE-QUARTER PROFILE head shot. HAND DETAILS, FOOT DETAILS (sneakers), and NECKLACE DETAIL close-ups. A BACK-VIEW casual-wear analysis. Two full-body POSES (A and B, casual street poses). Identical face, hair, outfit, build and height across every view. Neutral grey studio background, even soft studio lighting.

_scenes_note: scene:<id> jobs DAZ-convert the gathered internet establishing photo(s) into a DAZ3D location render that becomes the single-rung scene ref (banked into ref-ledger scene_ladders.<id>). Establishing scenes are empty of people. Reverse (-reverse) scenes are the 180-degree opposite view for L14 continuity on recurring hero locations. compose.py appends STYLE+NEG; attach paths are the on-disk gathered refs.

scenes.prompt: Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing render of a UP Manila health-sciences research lab interior at night: stainless steel benches, a central fume hood, a centrifuge, sample fridges, racks of amber vials, fluorescent ceiling light with a late-night blue cast through window blinds. Match the layout, equipment and perspective of the attached photos. Empty of people, clinical and foreboding.

DAZ3D Iray establishing render of the SAME UP Manila research lab as the attached reference, but seen from the 180-degree opposite side of the room (reverse angle): the door and floor drain wall now in view, the fume hood and benches seen from behind. Consistent equipment, materials and night blue-cast lighting with the attached reference. Empty of people.

Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing render of the UP Manila campus exterior in Ermita at dawn: mid-century concrete academic buildings, the campus gate with acacia trees, jeepneys on Padre Faura, tropical haze. Match the architecture and layout of the attached photos. Empty of people.

Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing render of a cordoned-off stretch of Manila Bay shoreline at dusk: a concrete storm outfall pipe discharging grey runoff into the sea shallows, a rope cordon staked into wet sand, breakwater, overcast sky. Match the outfall structure and shoreline of the attached photos. Empty of people.

DAZ3D Iray establishing render of the SAME Manila Bay outfall location as the attached reference, seen from the 180-degree opposite angle (looking back from the water toward the shore): the cordon, the leaning warning-sign post and the boardwalk/streetlights now facing camera, the outfall pipe behind. Consistent materials, dusk-to-night lighting with the attached reference. Empty of people.

Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing render of Manila Bay at golden hour: orange-red sky, silhouetted cargo ships and bancas on the horizon, breakwater rocks, the baywalk. Match the horizon line and sky of the attached photos. Empty of people.

Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing render of the artificial white-sand (dolomite) beach on Manila Baywalk: pale crushed-stone sand, low wave breakers, Roxas Boulevard palms and lampposts behind. Match the sand, breakwater and skyline of the attached photos. Empty of people.

DAZ3D Iray establishing render of the SAME dolomite beach as the attached reference, seen from the 180-degree opposite angle (looking from the water back toward Roxas Boulevard): the palms, lampposts and boardwalk facing camera, pale dolomite sand in the foreground. Consistent materials and lighting with the attached reference. Empty of people.

Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing aerial render of the Makati CBD skyline at dusk: glass office towers, evening lights, money-and-heat haze, EDSA's traffic and the distant bay with casino glow on the horizon. Match the skyline silhouette of the attached photos. Empty of people.

Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing render of EDSA highway at rush hour: bumper-to-bumper traffic, buses and jeepneys, the MRT line overhead, giant billboards, smog haze. Match the road layout and overhead rail of the attached photos. Vehicles only, no pedestrians in frame.

Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing render of the Poblacion Makati nightlife strip: neon bar signs, string lights overhead, rooftop bars, a crowded narrow street, warm night glow. Match the neon signage and street layout of the attached photos. Empty of people (signage and lights only).

Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing render of Entertainment City reclamation at night: Solaire / City of Dreams style casino facades, fountains, gold-and-purple light spill across the reclaimed bay. Match the facade architecture and light colour of the attached photos. Empty of people.

Convert the attached photographic references into a DAZ3D Iray establishing render of a mid-rise bayfront hotel room on Roxas Boulevard: neutral modern decor, a bed and door frame, a floor-to-ceiling window and small balcony facing Manila Bay with the bay visible through the glass, afternoon light. Match the room layout and the bay-view window of the attached photos. Empty of people.

DAZ3D Iray establishing render of the SAME bayfront hotel room as the attached reference, seen from the 180-degree opposite angle (from the window looking back into the room): the door frame, bed and entry wall facing camera, the bay window behind the camera. Consistent decor and lighting with the attached reference. Empty of people.
